problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
